db.title: Database Management
db.description: Create snapshot points, download full backup, apply SQL import or export/import by module.

help.snapshotDesc: take a restore point before risky operations, restore it.
help.moduleDesc: transfer only selected module tables (e.g. products).
help.uiDesc: export/bootstrap UI texts in bulk by locale.
help.closeHint: Tip: Click outside or press ESC to close.

fullDb.title: Database Backup & Snapshot Management
fullDb.description: You can create snapshots and download full database backups.
fullDb.downloadDesc: Download the current DB state as a full dump.
fullDb.jsonNotImplemented: JSON export feature not implemented yet. You can use SQL export.

import.title: SQL Import (IMPORT)
import.warning: These operations can permanently change database contents. Especially when truncate is checked, be sure to take a snapshot before proceeding.
import.helpDesc1: This panel applies SQL dump to the entire database (text / URL / file).
import.helpDesc2: empties tables before import. Very risky in production environment.
import.helpDesc3: is a dry run in supported flows (rollback).

text.label: SQL Script (utf8)
text.placeholder: Paste the full SQL script here.
text.helpDesc1: Paste the full SQL script here.
text.helpDesc2: Browser may slow down with very large dumps; file import is more suitable.

url.label: SQL Dump URL (.sql or .sql.gz)
url.required: First enter a valid .sql or .sql.gz URL.
url.helpDesc2: .sql.gz dumps transfer faster with large data.
url.helpDesc3: URLs requiring authentication/protection may not be downloadable by backend.

file.label: SQL Dump File (.sql or .gz)
file.note: There is no dry run in file import flow (only truncate is applied).
file.helpDesc1: Most stable method (recommended for large dumps).
file.helpDesc2: There is no dry run in file import flow.
file.helpDesc3: Nginx/Fastify body limit settings can affect file size.

truncate.label: TRUNCATE ALL tables before operation
truncate.helpDesc: Tables are emptied before import. Incorrect use leads to data loss. Taking a snapshot before the operation in production should be considered mandatory.
truncate.helpDescFile: This is the most critical option in file import. When enabled, tables are completely emptied before import. Consider taking a snapshot mandatory.

dryRun.label: Dry run (rehearsal, roll back changes)
dryRun.helpDesc: If backend supports, runs inside SQL transaction and rolls back. Some DDL operations can do implicit commit in MySQL; not 100% guaranteed.
dryRun.helpDescUrl: If backend supports, does transaction + rollback. Time and resource consumption increases with large dumps.

success.url: SQL dump from URL successfully imported.
success.file: SQL dump from file successfully imported.
success.dryRun: Dry run successful. Changes rolled back.

snapshots.title: Snapshot Points
snapshots.scrollNote: Note: If screen is narrow, table can be scrolled horizontally.
snapshots.restoreConfirm:
You are about to restore from this snapshot.

Snapshot: {label}

This operation will OVERWRITE current database contents (truncate).
Do you want to continue?
snapshots.restoreError: An error occurred during snapshot restore.

export.title: Module Export
export.description: Tables belonging to {module} module will be exported in manifest order.
export.notImplemented: Module export feature not implemented yet.

import.title: Module Import
import.description: Imports {module} module tables according to manifest order.
import.notImplemented: Module import feature not implemented yet.

validate.title: Manifest Validation
validate.description: Do tables in manifest exist in DB? Are there duplicates? Is sorting safe?

form.title: Setting
form.description: Structured mode: form editor. Raw mode: JSON or plain string.
form.structuredMissingDesc: No structured renderer is defined for this key. Use Raw mode.

form.rawTip: Tip: To save as JSON, start the text with '{' or '['.

detail.localesMissingDesc: site_settings.app_locales is empty or invalid. Configure languages first.

detail.note: Note: General/UI keys open a structured form. Other keys fall back to JSON editor in structured mode.
detail.siteMetaDefaultGlobalGuard: site_meta_default cannot be locale="*". Select a locale and save.

structuredJson.noRenderer: No structured form is defined for this key. Structured mode works as a JSON editor.
structuredJson.label: Structured JSON
structuredJson.helperText: Parsed on blur. Invalid JSON will not be saved.

general.title: General / UI
general.description: Default values and selected language ({locale}) customizations are managed together.
general.noOverrideNote: No custom value for {locale}, using default value.
general.restoreTooltip: Resets this setting to its default value
general.missingGlobalError: No default record found. You need to create a default value first.
general.deleteTooltip: "Delete Default" removes the main record for all languages. "Delete Customization" only removes the custom value for the selected language.

cloudinary.title: Cloudinary / Storage Settings
cloudinary.description: These are global settings (locale=*). Selected language is for UI only.
cloudinary.testSuccess: Cloudinary connection successful. Cloud: {cloud}, test file: {publicId}
